headline: OpenAI secures a record-breaking $110B investment from Amazon, NVIDIA, and SoftBank.

items.title: OpenAI secures $110B investment
items.summary: OpenAI announced a massive $110 billion funding round, pushing its valuation to $730 billion pre-money. This includes significant contributions from major tech companies such as $30 billion from SoftBank, $30 billion from NVIDIA, and $50 billion from Amazon. This funding is aimed at expanding OpenAI's capabilities in AI research and development, particularly in large-scale AI models and infrastructure.
items.why_it_matters: This unprecedented investment highlights the increasing financial stakes in AI development and OpenAI's dominant position in the field.

items.title: Stateful Runtime Environment for Amazon Bedrock
items.summary: Amazon Bedrock has introduced a Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents, enhancing the orchestration of AI workflows. This new environment supports persistent memory and secure execution, which is crucial for managing complex, multi-step AI tasks. It is designed to work seamlessly with OpenAI's tools, providing developers with a robust platform for building scalable AI solutions.

items.title: Develop Native Multimodal Agents with Qwen3.5 VLM
items.summary: Alibaba has released the Qwen3.5 series, a new open-source model designed for native multimodal agents. The model leverages NVIDIA GPU-accelerated endpoints to enhance performance in complex AI tasks. The Qwen3.5 model features approximately 400 billion parameters, offering significant capabilities for developers building advanced AI tools.

items.title: GitHub Copilot CLI Guide
items.summary: GitHub has released a guide for using its Copilot CLI, demonstrating how developers can transition from ideas to pull requests efficiently. The guide outlines how Copilot CLI integrates with various IDEs and GitHub, streamlining the coding process through AI assistance.

items.title: OpenAI and Amazon partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Amazon have announced a strategic partnership to integrate OpenAI's Frontier platform with Amazon Web Services (AWS). This collaboration aims to enhance AI infrastructure and develop custom models and enterprise AI agents, broadening the AI capabilities available to AWS users.

all_items.title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
all_items.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.

all_items.title: Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock
all_items.summary: Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI.

all_items.title: Scaling AI for everyone
all_items.summary: Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon.

all_items.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
all_items.summary: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.
